title: In vitro Cultivation and Microbiome Analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"153bb","text":"This protocol describes the steps for building a setup for in vitro rumen cultivation. The full workflow of inoculation of ruminal cultures, measurement of produced gases, as well as the analysis of the microbiome is described. As result one should be able to build a fully functioning rumen cultivation setup to screen for compounds of interest or to conduct any other rumen cultivation related studies.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":59,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
